_about: Wave 1p4hi AC-10 / 1p4mf AC-6 known-answer recall harness. Committed gate artifact (was previously transient in workflows). Run with run_recall_eval.py against the LOCAL project index. constant_value_queries validate that 1p4mf's constant chunks make a constant's VALUE retrievable; symbol_recall_queries are the dilution baseline (their answers must not regress when constant chunks are added). baseline_rank values were captured at CHUNKER_VERSION=25 (pre-1p4mf) via workflow wf_0e43fa6a-7ae + /tmp/ac10_budget_sweep.py; null = not measured pre-1p4mf (the chunk did not exist).
_match_note: answer_any holds DECLARATION-distinctive strings (the value literal, or the full `NAME = value` assignment) — NOT the bare constant name, so a usage site that merely references the name cannot satisfy the match. A hit means the constant's declaration/value was retrieved.

constant_value_queries.query: what cross-encoder reranker model does local mode use?
what embedding model does wavefoundry use for code search?
what is the agent-mode text budget for code_ask candidates?
what is the relevance drop-off ratio for agent-mode candidate selection?
what is the per-index coverage floor for agent-mode candidates?

symbol_recall_queries.query: how does code_ask agent mode decide how many candidates to return?
how is docs-lint run automatically after editing files under docs/?
what does _demote_doc_results do and when does it run?
how does RRF merge the docs and code candidate lists?
